title: Grazer (Alderaan)
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Grazer}} {{Species |image=[[File:Grazers.jpg]] |name=Grazer
Domestic grazer (left) and wild grazer (right) |designation= |class= |subspecies= |races= |height= |length= |wingspan= |mass= |skincolor= |haircolor= |feathers= |eyecolor= |distinctions= |lifespan= |origin=[[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]] |habitat= |diet= |language= }} The '''grazer''' was a docile, four legged, slow-moving herbivore native to the planet [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]]. Bred for their rich source of nutritious and tasty meat and agricultural purposes, grazers were easy to manage and grew to tremendous sizes. Due to many been moved offworld long ago, they cheated extinction of their home world when it was destroyed in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]]. Grazers were also related to the [[Nerf/Legends|Nerf]]. Wild grazers were significantly leaner than the fatter and more well-fed domestic grazer. ==Appearances== *''[[Coruscant Nights I: Jedi Twilight]]'' {{Mo}} *''[[Rebel Force: Hostage]]'' {{Mo}} *''[[Jedi Search]]'' {{Mo}} *[[Dark Apprentice (novel)|''Dark Apprentice'']] *''[[Planet of Twilight]]'' ==Sources== *''[[The Illustrated Star Wars Universe]]'' *{{Kids1997Cite|5|Star Wars Kids Feature Planet|On Our Planet: Alderaan}} *''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Wildlife of Star Wars: A Field Guide]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' *{{DB|creature|grazer|grazer}} {{Interlang |nl=Grazer }} [[Category:Creatures of Alderaan]] [[Category:Domesticated creatures]] [[Category:Food creatures]] [[Category:Grassland and plains creatures]] [[Category:Herbivorous creatures]] [[Category:Species of undefined sentience]] [[Category:Vertebrates]]
